{{CargoRelic
|name=No. 23's Ball
|rank=AA
|affct=CIV
|birthday=02-14
|source=Expert Scrolls (0.95%), Fragment Crafting (3.7%), Lottery Machine (0.08%), Wishing (0.34%)
|description=On Feb 14, 2003, Michael Jordan signed on a basketball before retirement.

When Michael Jordan announced his retirement, the price of all his signed items soared. In the exhibition hall of a certain stadium, there was a basketball. He wrote "The Last Shot" under the trademark of the ball, as it was the last ball he signed before his retirement.
|fame=40
|art=30
|fth=41
|civ=69
|tech=48
|ss1=Star Coins from Free Daily Star Coins +16%<br>Club Chests from Free Daily Star Coins +20%
|ss2=Star Coins from Free Daily Star Coins +20%<br>Club Chests from Free Daily Star Coins +30%
|ss3=Star Coins from Free Daily Star Coins +24%<br>Club Chests from Free Daily Star Coins +40%
|ss4=Star Coins from Free Daily Star Coins +30%<br>Club Chests from Free Daily Star Coins +60%
|ss5=Star Coins from Free Daily Star Coins +40%<br>Club Chests from Free Daily Star Coins +80%
|ss7=Star Coins from Free Daily Star Coins +40%<br>Club Chests from Free Daily Star Coins +80%<br>Club Chests from Free Daily Star Coins +70% (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Arena skill II.png|50px]] Place in Snail Arena Compass: In Snail Arena, Fire RES +15
|skill2=[[File:Arena skill II.png|50px]] Place in Snail Arena Compass: In Snail Arena, Fire DMG +60
}}

[[Category:Star Coin Boost]]
[[Category:Club Chest Boost]]
[[Category:Snail Arena Compass Boost]]
[[Category:Fire RES Boost]]
[[Category:Fire DMG Boost]]
[[Category:Relic Boost]]
[[Category:RUSH Boost]]
[[Category:Exploration Reagent Drop Boost]]
[[Category:Enhanced by Relic Points]]
